user.title: Setup Tracking Numbers
user.description: Connect your email account to track package deliveries

data.trackingmore_api_key: TrackingMore API key (optional, for live delivery status)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to email server. Please check your settings.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your email and password.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This email account is already configured

data.days_old: Days to scan (how far back to check emails)

status_provider.title: Live status provider
status_provider.description: Choose how delivery status is fetched. Carrier-direct is free (enter credentials below); TrackingMore uses your API key.

data.trackingmore_api_key: TrackingMore API key (only for the TrackingMore provider)

carrier_credentials.title: Carrier API credentials
carrier_credentials.description: Free developer credentials per carrier. Leave a carrier blank to skip it. Used only when the status provider is Carrier-direct.

add_manual_tracking_number.name: Add manual tracking number
add_manual_tracking_number.description: Store a tracking number without an email match so it appears in the card.

entity_id.name: Target sensor
entity_id.description: Tracking Numbers sensor that should receive the manual entry

link.name: Tracking link
link.description: Optional URL that opens when the entry is tapped

remove_tracking_number.name: Remove tracking number
remove_tracking_number.description: Delete a manual entry or hide a tracking number pulled from email.

entity_id.name: Target sensor
entity_id.description: Tracking Numbers sensor that should remove the entry
